studio.title: Studio — PixelVault

signIn.title: Sign In — PixelVault

signUp.title: Create Account — PixelVault
signUp.description: Join PixelVault to generate, archive, and share AI-created images.

Homepage.brandSubline: A quieter place to make and keep AI images.
Homepage.heroDescription: Multi-model image generation with permanent archiving.
Homepage.heroRepelText: Use Gemini, DALL-E, Flux, NovelAI and 34 more models to generate images. Turn any image into video with Seedance, Kling, and Luma. Compare models side-by-side in blind Arena battles. Build storyboards from your generations. Every creation is permanently saved with its prompt, settings, and metadata — your personal creative archive, built one generation at a time.

auth.note: Your account keeps saved routes, private prompts, and archived generations together across sessions.

signIn.title: Return to your archive.
signIn.description: Sign in to continue generating, review saved work, and keep your usage history intact.

signUp.title: Begin a calmer image workflow.
signUp.description: Create an account to generate with multiple models, save each keeper, and build a record you can return to later.

stage.label: Gallery preview
stage.title: See how it comes together.
stage.value: A cleaner record of how you create

signals.modelCoverageValue: {modelCount} image models across {providerCount, plural, one {# provider} other {# providers}}
signals.archiveValue: Prompt, model, provider, and output stay together

features.title: A quieter workflow for making images.
features.description: PixelVault keeps the studio focused and the archive readable, so the interface does not compete with the work.

chooseEngine.title: Switch models without switching tools
chooseEngine.description: Move between realism, anime styling, OpenAI image generation, and Gemini exploration from one studio.

keepEveryKeeper.title: Keep the work worth revisiting
keepEveryKeeper.description: Good results do not disappear after one session. They stay in an archive you can return to later.

spendCredits.title: See what each run costs
spendCredits.description: Each generation keeps its provider and model context, so usage stays understandable instead of vague.

comparison.title: Your keys. Your images. Zero markup.
comparison.description: Unlike Midjourney or OpenArt, you connect your own API keys — no subscription, no per-image fees, no vendor lock-in.

byok.title: Bring your own keys
byok.description: Use API keys from OpenAI, Google, fal.ai, Replicate, NovelAI, or HuggingFace. We never see your keys — they are encrypted end-to-end.

archive.title: Permanent archive
archive.description: Every generation is stored in your personal gallery on Cloudflare R2. No expiring links, no download-before-it-disappears.

arena.title: Arena — find the best model
arena.description: Blind side-by-side comparison with ELO ranking. Let your eyes decide which model wins, not marketing.

workflow.title: From prompt to archive, without clutter.
workflow.description: Pick a model, write with intent, and keep the result with the context that produced it.

frameIdea.title: Frame the idea
frameIdea.description: Start with the prompt and choose the model that fits the image you want to make.

generateWithIntent.title: Generate with intent
generateWithIntent.description: Compare photoreal, anime, OpenAI, and Gemini outputs without leaving the same workspace.

archiveWinners.title: Archive the winners
archiveWinners.description: Keep the prompt, route, and final image together so the next session starts with context.

models.title: Multi-provider models. One calm workspace.
models.description: Switch between OpenAI, Google, NovelAI, and open-source models without changing tools.

sdxlRealism.prompt: Stormlight sweeping across a quiet brutalist museum courtyard

animagineAnime.prompt: Courier on a hoverboard threading through a lantern market at dusk

geminiConcept.prompt: Editorial still life of camera parts, metal tools, and pressed flowers

dalleCreative.prompt: A cozy reading nook with rain streaking down a tall window

fluxPro.prompt: Morning light catching dewdrops on a spider web between fence posts

novelaiIllust.prompt: Alchemist's workshop filled with glowing bottles and scattered notes

valueProps.title: Your keys. Your images. Zero markup.

chooseEngine.title: Switch models freely
chooseEngine.description: Realism, anime, DALL-E, Gemini — one studio.

keepEveryKeeper.title: Keep what matters
keepEveryKeeper.description: Good results stay in your archive, always.

spendCredits.title: Transparent usage
spendCredits.description: Every generation shows provider and cost.

permanentArchive.title: Permanent archive
permanentArchive.description: Stored on Cloudflare R2. No expiring links.

footer.title: The image is only part of the work.
footer.description: PixelVault keeps the surrounding context intact, so the next idea starts from memory instead of guesswork.

AdvancedSettings.title: Advanced Settings
AdvancedSettings.negativePromptHint: Describe elements you want to exclude from the generated image, such as blur, noise, or unwanted objects.
AdvancedSettings.negativePromptPlaceholder: Elements to avoid in the generated image...
AdvancedSettings.guidanceScaleHint: Controls how closely the image follows the prompt. Higher values produce more accurate but less creative results.
AdvancedSettings.stepsHint: Number of denoising iterations. More steps generally improve quality but increase generation time.
AdvancedSettings.referenceStrengthHint: How much the reference image influences the result. Lower values give AI more creative freedom.
AdvancedSettings.seedHint: Fix the random seed for reproducible results. Leave empty for a random seed each time.
AdvancedSettings.qualityHint: Output quality level. Higher quality produces more detailed images but may take longer.
AdvancedSettings.backgroundHint: Choose whether the generated image has a transparent or opaque background.
AdvancedSettings.styleHint: Vivid produces dramatic, vibrant images. Natural generates more subdued, realistic results.
AdvancedSettings.loraHint: Apply custom LoRA models for style, character, or concept control. Paste a URL from Civitai or HuggingFace.
AdvancedSettings.noConfigurable: This model has no configurable advanced settings

welcome.title: Welcome to PixelVault
welcome.description: You can start for free — 5 generations/day with no API key. Bind your own keys later to unlock all models and unlimited usage.

model.title: Choose a model
model.description: Models marked "Free" can be used without an API key — up to 5 times per day. Bind your own key to unlock all models.

prompt.title: Write your prompt
prompt.description: Describe what you want to see. Be specific about subject, lighting, composition, and style.

apiKey.title: Want to use your own API key?
apiKey.description: You can add your own provider keys for unlimited generation. Skip this if you want to use the default workspace keys.

generate.title: Generate!
generate.description: Hit this button when you're ready. Your image will be auto-archived with its prompt and model info.

sdxl.label: Stable Diffusion XL
sdxl.description: High-resolution image generation with excellent detail.

geminiFlashImage.label: Gemini 3.1 Flash Image
geminiFlashImage.description: Fast image exploration powered by Google's latest generation model.

openaiGptImage15.label: OpenAI GPT Image 1.5
openaiGptImage15.description: OpenAI's latest image model for polished, prompt-faithful image generation.

flux2Pro.label: Flux 2 Pro
flux2Pro.description: Top-ranked image model by Black Forest Labs with exceptional quality.

flux2Dev.label: Flux 2 Dev
flux2Dev.description: Cost-effective variant of Flux 2 for development and iteration.

flux2Schnell.label: Flux 2 Schnell
flux2Schnell.description: Fastest Flux 2 variant for rapid prototyping and quick generation.

fluxLora.label: FLUX LoRA
fluxLora.description: FLUX with LoRA support. Apply custom LoRA models for anime, 3D, character consistency, and more.

geminiProImage.label: Gemini 3.1 Pro Image
geminiProImage.description: Google's premium image model with studio-quality 4K visuals.

ideogram3.label: Ideogram V3
ideogram3.description: Best-in-class text rendering in images with fast 4-second generation.

recraftV3.label: Recraft V3
recraftV3.description: Design-focused image model with strong brand and style system support.

seedream45.label: Seedream 4.5
seedream45.description: ByteDance's unified generation and editing model with up to 4MP output.

seedream50Lite.label: Seedream 5.0 Lite
seedream50Lite.description: ByteDance's latest lightweight model via VolcEngine. Best quality-to-speed ratio.

seedream40.label: Seedream 4.0
seedream40.description: ByteDance's mid-tier model via VolcEngine with improved quality and 4K support.

seedream30.label: Seedream 3.0
seedream30.description: ByteDance's entry-level model via VolcEngine. Fast and cost-effective.

sd35Large.label: Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large
sd35Large.description: Open-source flagship with 8B MMDiT architecture, strong composition and detail.

novelaiV45Full.label: NovelAI Diffusion V4.5 Full
novelaiV45Full.description: Latest NovelAI model with improved fidelity, multi-character support, and text rendering.

novelaiV45Curated.label: NovelAI Diffusion V4.5 Curated
novelaiV45Curated.description: Curated variant trained on cleaner data — easier to steer, ideal for consistent quality.

novelaiV4Full.label: NovelAI Diffusion V4 Full
novelaiV4Full.description: Previous-gen NovelAI original model with broad dataset coverage.

novelaiV3.label: NovelAI Diffusion Anime V3
novelaiV3.description: SDXL-based anime specialist with tag-priority prompting system.

illustriousXl.label: Illustrious XL
illustriousXl.description: Anime/illustration-specialized model with the largest LoRA ecosystem on Civitai. Supports dual LoRA.

gemini25FlashImage.label: Gemini 2.5 Flash
gemini25FlashImage.description: Fast and cost-effective by Google. Good text rendering and prompt understanding.

flux2Max.label: FLUX 2 Max
flux2Max.description: Highest quality FLUX model by Black Forest Labs. Exceptional detail and coherence.

recraftV4Pro.label: Recraft V4 Pro
recraftV4Pro.description: Design-focused model for logos, icons, and brand-quality imagery.

fluxKontextPro.label: FLUX Kontext Pro
fluxKontextPro.description: Reference-based editing. Upload an image and describe changes with a prompt.

fluxKontextMax.label: FLUX Kontext Max
fluxKontextMax.description: Multi-reference editing. Combine up to 4 reference images for consistent generation.

playgroundV25.label: Playground v2.5
playgroundV25.description: Aesthetic-focused generation, excels at portraits and artistic compositions.

veo3.label: Veo 3.1
veo3.description: Google's latest — 4K, native audio, dialogue sync

klingV3Pro.label: Kling 3.0 Pro
klingV3Pro.description: Multi-shot storyboarding, native audio, character consistency

seedance20.label: Seedance 2.0
seedance20.description: ByteDance — native audio + lipsync, director-level camera, 4-15s

seedance20Volc.label: Seedance 2.0 (VolcEngine)
seedance20Volc.description: VolcEngine — native audio + lipsync, director-level camera

seedancePro.label: Seedance Pro
seedancePro.description: ByteDance — native audio, cinematic camera controls

seedance15Pro.label: Seedance 1.5 Pro
seedance15Pro.description: VolcEngine — native audio, first/last frame, draft mode

seedance10Pro.label: Seedance 1.0 Pro
seedance10Pro.description: VolcEngine — first/last frame control, reliable quality

klingVideo.label: Kling V2.1
klingVideo.description: Reliable cinematic video, motion-aware, I2V support

lumaRay2.label: Luma Ray 2
lumaRay2.description: Up to 1080p, loop support, dual-image interpolation

wanVideo.label: Wan 2.6
wanVideo.description: Multi-modal with native audio, up to 1080p, great value

runwayGen3.label: Runway Gen-3 Turbo
runwayGen3.description: Industry-standard cinematic video, image-to-video on fal.ai

fishAudioS2Pro.label: Fish Audio S2 Pro
fishAudioS2Pro.description: Top-ranked TTS, 30+ languages, natural voice cloning

falF5Tts.label: F5-TTS
falF5Tts.description: Open-source zero-shot voice cloning on fal.ai

StudioWorkbenchDraft.title: Workbench direction for a denser, ComfyUI-like studio.
StudioWorkbenchDraft.description: This draft restores a fixed preview, demotes history to a filmstrip, and turns the center column into a focused compose surface.
StudioWorkbenchDraft.note: Draft only. Static mock data for layout and interaction review.
StudioWorkbenchDraft.summary: The goal is not to copy node graphs. The goal is to borrow the best part of creator tools: current state stays visible, history stays secondary, and the compose area stays concentrated around the next run.

desktop.title: Desktop workbench draft
desktop.description: Sidebar for resources, center for composition, fixed preview for the active result, and a filmstrip below.

sidebar.title: Resources
sidebar.collectionHint: Reusable ingredients stay here instead of crowding the main compose surface.

compose.title: Compose
compose.subtitle: Model selection, prompt writing, reference intake, and status all stay in one dense working column.
compose.promptValue: Editorial portrait of a bike courier stepping through orange rainlight, reflective jacket, wet pavement, cinematic depth, realistic texture.
compose.promptHint: Programmatic writes from remix, reverse, and enhancement should resize this field automatically.
compose.referenceHint: References should have a clear destination instead of hiding behind a toolbar toggle.
compose.failureTitle: Failure stays visible while you keep browsing.
compose.failureHint: Retry should remain anchored in the compose and preview flow, not disappear into history.
compose.advancedOpenHint: Open groups should summarize what they control instead of dumping one long list.

preview.title: Result preview
preview.subtitle: The active result stays fixed so loading, success, and failure never compete with history.
preview.selectionHint: History can change what is previewed, but the preview region stays stable.
preview.recoveryTitle: Recovery belongs next to the result.
preview.recoveryHint: If generation fails, the preview side should keep the error and retry affordance in sight.
preview.filmstripHint: Single click previews, double click opens detail, drag sends to reference.

mobile.title: Mobile flow draft
mobile.description: Mobile should keep the same order of importance, but move tools into a bottom sheet.
mobile.note: Preview first, compose second, history third, tools in a bottom sheet.
